methods.description: Procedure for determining the particle size distribution of sediment samples using a laser diffraction analyzer after chemical pretreatment to remove organic matter and carbonates, and dispersion. This method classifies samples into clay, silt, and sand fractions and calculates mean and median grain sizes.

steps.description: We set the time of measurement of this analyser to 90 s with a measurement range of 0.04-2000 μm.
steps.searchable_summary: Configure laser diffraction particle size analyzer settings

steps.description: Before measuring the sample, we performed a control analysis (the control standard: Coulter LS control GB 500, Beckman Coulter, Inc.) by using a standard operating method and ensuring that the measurement result was within the following limits: mean: 582±34.5 μm; and SD: 45.4±22.5 μm.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform control analysis for particle size analyzer calibration validation

steps.description: We chose a total of 165 sub-samples along the core at intervals of 2 cm.
steps.searchable_summary: Select subsamples from sediment core at specified intervals

steps.description: Samples were first naturally dried at room temperature
steps.searchable_summary: Air dry sediment subsamples at room temperature

steps.description: and then 0.25-0.28 g per sample was weighed in a 100 ml beaker.
steps.searchable_summary: Weigh a specific mass of dried subsample

steps.description: Next, 10 ml of 10% H2O2 was added to remove organic matter
steps.searchable_summary: Add hydrogen peroxide to remove organic matter from samples

steps.description: and 10 ml of 10% HCl was added to eliminate carbonate.
steps.searchable_summary: Add hydrochloric acid to remove carbonates from samples

steps.description: The samples were then washed
steps.searchable_summary: Wash chemically treated samples

steps.description: and 10 ml 0.01 mol/L Na(PO3)6 was added to disperse the samples before testing.
steps.searchable_summary: Add sodium hexametaphosphate for sample dispersion

steps.description: (Implicitly, measure the dispersed samples using the analyzer)
steps.searchable_summary: Measure particle size distribution using laser diffraction analyzer
outputs: Particle size distribution data for each sample

steps.description: We classified the clay (0.04-4 μm), silt (4-63 μm), and sand (63-2000 μm) fractions, the mean grain size (Mz) and the median diameter (Md) of each sample.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate grain size fractions (clay, silt, sand), mean grain size (Mz), and median diameter (Md) from particle size distribution data

steps.description: The distributions of these 3 fractions from all subsamples are shown using the curve of depth changes and a ternary diagram (Fig 3c).
steps.searchable_summary: Generate depth profile curves and ternary diagrams for grain size fractions

methods.description: Procedure for collecting a sediment core from the Paozi basin using a specific drill, transporting it to the laboratory, describing its stratigraphy, and preparing subsamples by drying and sieving for subsequent analyses.

steps.description: During August 2018, we collected one core (122°00′42.53″E, 39°42′57.74″N) from Xipao Village using a Xy-2 drill produced by the Chongqing drilling geological machinery factory with the assistance of the Liaoning Hydrogeology Engineering Geological Survey Institute.
steps.searchable_summary: Collect sediment core using a specific drill at a specified location and date
inputs: Assistance (Liaoning Hydrogeology Engineering Geological Survey Institute)

steps.description: A total of eight core sections were wrapped and transported to the laboratory.
steps.searchable_summary: Wrap and transport core sections to laboratory

steps.description: We first described the stratigraphy
steps.searchable_summary: Describe stratigraphy of sediment core sections

steps.description: before subsampling at 2 cm intervals,
steps.searchable_summary: Subsample sediment core at specified intervals

steps.description: and we took care to remove potentially contaminated sections.
steps.searchable_summary: Remove potentially contaminated sections during subsampling

steps.description: The samples were then air dried
steps.searchable_summary: Air dry sediment subsamples

steps.description: before sieving at 2 mm,
steps.searchable_summary: Sieve dried subsamples at a specific mesh size

steps.description: and we ultimately obtained 165 subsamples for subsequent analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: Obtain final prepared subsamples for downstream analysis
